# A Help Deck — Student Helper

> A Help Deck is an independent, community-run student helper app. It lets students read admin announcements, browse and share subject notes, and reach free public study tools and portals in one place. Not affiliated with any college, university, or government body.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Announcements, notes library, subject directory, quick links to free study portals, and study tools.
- [Notes](/notes): Shared subject notes and study material.
- [Notifications](/notifications): Full history of admin announcements.

## Topics covered

- Admin-posted announcements and updates for students
- Shared subject notes across common undergraduate subjects (Bengali, English, History, Geography, Sanskrit, Philosophy, Political Science, Environmental Studies)
- Free public study platforms: SWAYAM, NPTEL, National Digital Library, DigiLocker, National Scholarship Portal, e-PG Pathshala
- Study tools: CGPA calculator, Pomodoro timer, bookmarking
